name: Deadly
bestOn: Items that already have high base damage
notes: Crit doubles ALL effects simultaneously — damage, burn, poison, shield, heal. Exceptional on items with secondary effects.

name: Fiery
effect: Applies Burn equal to 10% of the item's damage
notes: The Burn amount scales with item damage — enchant your highest-damage item for maximum Burn value. Pairs perfectly with Burn-scaling items (Calcinator, Grill).

name: Heavy
notes: More valuable when placed on low-CD items that activate frequently. Slowing opponent's Core or engine item can break their combo timing.

name: Icy
notes: Exceptional against Dooley — freezing his Core breaks the entire trigger chain. Against any hero, freezing their highest-value item is a significant tempo swing.

name: Obsidian
notes: The most straightforward and powerful damage enchantment. Doubles the base damage before scaling calculations. Mak's best enchantment by far — transforms slow poison items into major threats.

name: Radiant
effect: Cannot be Frozen, Slowed, or Destroyed
notes: Complete immunity to all control effects. Essential on Dooley's Core since Freeze is his primary counter. Also protects Mak's key weapons and Stelle's flying items.

name: Restorative
bestOn: Any hero needing sustain without a dedicated healer
notes: Heal removes 1 Poison AND 1 Burn per trigger — not just HP recovery. On a fast weapon, this continuously clears DoT effects. Mak's best defensive option since he lacks natural shield items.

name: Shielded
notes: The amount of Shield applied scales with item quality. Pairs powerfully with Pyg's Shield-to-damage builds. Note: Durian (Jules) converts your shield into damage against you.

name: Shiny
bestOn: Poison/Burn items for doubled DoT application
notes: Each Multicast activation counts as a SEPARATE item use — procs all 'when you use this item' triggers again. Exponential value on items with secondary effects. One of the highest-ceiling enchantments.

name: Toxic
effect: Applies Poison equal to 10% of the item's damage
notes: Poison bypasses Shield entirely — exceptional against Pyg or any shield-heavy board. The Poison amount scales with item damage. Pairs with Retort (Mak) which gains permanent +Poison per reagent transformed.

name: Turbo
bestOn: Items adjacent to key damage items
notes: Procs Stelle's Stellear Swallowtail and Pill Buggy haste-triggers. On a fast item, Turbo can generate near-permanent Haste on adjacent items. Exceptional in Dooley builds to accelerate the entire chain.
